text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Now, Meisho Doto. Would you read page
thirty-six of the textbook for us?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... For the first time in its history, the Enka
Fest is said to be postponed this year, as the star
unexpectedly strained their... back?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-this isn't the textbook! Oh no, I'm so s-sorry
about this!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-it should be th-this one... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, this is the screenplay Opera O gave me!
B-but my textbook... isn't here?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm r-really sorry, but... I must have forgotten to
bring it with me!

Meisho Doto remorsefully shares a textbook with
a classmate for the rest of the day.
